hero.subtitle: Transform long URLs into trackable short links with real-time analytics. No complications, no setup. Just results.

shortUrls.title: Short URLs

geolocation.title: Geolocation
geolocation.description: Know which country, region, and city your clicks come from.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Redis cache. Redirects under 50ms. 100x faster performance.

device.description: Mobile, Desktop, Tablet. Know what your users are using.

step3.description: View real-time analytics: clicks, sources, locations.
